steps.title: Summarize the whole passage
steps.content: The passage introduces al-Idrisi's medieval map collection, explains its title, and describes how he created it by consulting maps and interviewing travelers. The main purpose must cover both the collection and its creation.

steps.title: Avoid narrower purposes
steps.content: A focuses on benefits of studying mapmaking, B wrongly says travelers created the maps, and D claims the passage compares Arabic and Greek mapmaking techniques. Each misses the passage's full purpose. The answer is C.
